name: foreman-os-plugin
description: ForemanOS — modular construction management plugins for superintendents.

plugins.name: foremanos-core
plugins.description: Project setup, data, dashboards, briefings, rendering. Install first.

plugins.name: foremanos-intel
plugins.description: Document intelligence, DWG extraction, quantitative takeoffs.

plugins.name: foremanos-field
plugins.description: Daily reporting, safety, quality, inspections, labor, punch lists. 21 field guides.

plugins.name: foremanos-planning
plugins.description: Scheduling, look-aheads, Last Planner, weekly reports, material tracking.

plugins.name: foremanos-doccontrol
plugins.description: RFI preparation, submittal reviews, drawing control, annotations, BIM.

plugins.name: foremanos-cost
plugins.description: Cost tracking, earned value, pay apps, change orders, delays, claims.

plugins.name: foremanos-compliance
plugins.description: Risk registers, environmental, closeout, commissioning, sub scorecards, conflicts.
